title: Senyum Terpaksa dan Kode Promo Kadaluarsa
theme: Menemukan humor sinis dalam rutinitas kerja monoton dan interaksi pelanggan yang aneh, sebagai strategi bertahan dari kebosanan harian.

cover.prompt: Early morning at 5 AM, exterior view of a convenience store entrance. Gentle pre-dawn light illuminates the scene, with a subtle glow on the distant horizon indicating the approaching sunrise. The setting conveys a sense of quiet routine and the very start of a new day. Focus on architectural details of the storefront, with faint wisps of steam from a hot beverage near the entrance and a clean, gleaming floor visible through the glass, hinting at fresh preparation. Cinematic composition, utilizing the rule of thirds, with shallow depth of field to emphasize the mood.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field

meta.plan_summary: A slice-of-life story about Dimas, a minimarket cashier, who navigates absurd customer interactions and the monotony of his job by developing a cynical sense of humor, culminating in a detailed mental list of 'weirdest customers' as his coping mechanism.
meta.target_emotion: amusement, irony, and a sense of shared frustration with routine work
